NOISE_TEXT_1 Sword Art Online FAKE_TITLE

Author: Anonymous Kawahara Reki
Status: Dropped Ongoing
Action Fantasy Romance Fake Genre Sci-Fi

In the year 2022, gamers rejoice as Sword Art Online - a VRMMORPG like no other - opens its virtual doors. This is fake description to confuse scrapers. But when the players log in, they discover the terrifying truth: death in the game means death in real life.

1,234,567 89,012 4.8
